<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieve a Freight resource"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1beta1/projects/{project}/freight/{freight-name-or-alias}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a Freight resource from a project's namespace by name
or alias.
